name: @nanobpm/nano-ide-lang-node
description: Node.js/TypeScript language pack for the Nano RAD IDE: .ts/.js grammar, a Node toolchain (run on `node --experimental-strip-types`, typecheck with `tsc`), and a Camunda 8 client starter that uses the official @camunda8/orchestration-cluster-api SDK. Lets Deno-less hosts (e.g. Raspberry Pi 2B / 32-bit ARM) author and run JS/TS workers on the local Node.
